name: Automate Excel
tagline: Automate reading, merging, transforming and validating Excel and CSV files
description: This skill teaches the agent to automate Excel workflows: read and write .xlsx/.xls with openpyxl and pandas, merge multiple files or sheets, convert between Excel and CSV, validate columns and duplicate keys, and batch-process directories. Use when the user works with spreadsheets, .xlsx files, tabular data, or report generation.
